combat_pillars.melee: stable, no resource cost, best sustained single-target baseline
combat_pillars.ranged: safer than melee, slightly lower baseline damage, positioning advantage
combat_pillars.magic: highest flexibility and burst, controlled by mp cost and spell level
combat_pillars.support: low direct damage, high survival and tempo value

rules.race_role: starting bias, not full build definition

armor_magic_interaction.rule: wearing non-robe armor reduces spell power multiplicatively
armor_magic_interaction.design_intent: encourages mages to stay in robes; no hard failure, just output penalty
